title: hieracium salticola
side_effects: Hieracium salticola can have side effects if used improperly, such as causing stomach upset, nausea, and diarrhea due to its high tannin content. Prolonged consumption can also lead to kidney damage and liver inflammation, as well as interact negatively with certain medications. Ingesting large quantities of the plant can cause allergic reactions, including hives, itching, and difficulty breathing in some individuals. Furthermore, improper use of Hieracium salticola can also lead to an increased risk of bleeding and bruising due to its anticoagulant properties.
